message:
chore: add ftui/ftui-harness dev-dependencies and tui_rendering test target

- Cargo.toml: add [[test]] target for tests/e2e/tui_rendering.rs
- Cargo.toml: add ftui, ftui-harness, vc_tui to [dev-dependencies]
- Cargo.lock: updated with new dependency resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -126,6 +126,10 @@ build = "build.rs"
 name = "vc"
 path = "src/main.rs"
 
+[[test]]
+name = "tui_rendering"
+path = "tests/e2e/tui_rendering.rs"
+
 [dependencies]
 vc_cli.workspace = true
 vc_config.workspace = true
@@ -138,7 +142,10 @@ tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 anyhow.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+ftui.workspace = true
+ftui-harness.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
+vc_tui.workspace = true
 
 [build-dependencies]
 vergen-gix = { version = "9.1.0", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
